items.title: Animated role selector interaction contract
items.precondition: Frontend dependencies are available in the linked worktree.
steps: Run npm run test -- UserRoleSelect.test.tsx from frontend/.
items.expected: Mouse selection, Arrow Up/Down, Enter, Escape, listbox semantics, and focus restoration pass.
items.notes: JSDOM does not implement the HTML Popover API, so the test reads the portaled listbox with hidden-role queries while exercising the real state and keyboard handlers.

items.title: Desktop Team Members table remains stable
items.precondition: Use a safe contained Alloro runtime with an authenticated admin Pilot session.
steps: Open /admin and Pilot into a seeded organization.
Enter role edit mode for a member.
items.expected: User, Role, Joined, and Actions columns remain stable; Change role, Remove, Save, and Cancel stay on one line.
items.notes: Blocked from automated browser execution because this repository has no test:worktree adapter.
items.waiver: Explicitly waived by Dave on 2026-07-16 after contained acceptance was blocked by the missing repository-owned test:worktree adapter. The desktop UI check was not run; this waiver accepts that risk for the dev/dave merge.

items.title: Role selector renders above table overflow
items.precondition: Authenticated admin on /settings/users with at least two members.
steps: Open the last available Change role control.
Use mouse and keyboard to move through Viewer, Manager, and Admin.
Press Escape, then reopen and click outside.
items.expected: The animated menu is not clipped, stays within the viewport, closes correctly, and restores focus after keyboard dismissal.
items.notes: Requires a real Chromium pass because CSS anchor positioning and the Popover top layer are not modeled by JSDOM.
items.waiver: Explicitly waived by Dave on 2026-07-16 after contained acceptance was blocked by the missing repository-owned test:worktree adapter. The real-browser popover and clipping check was not run; this waiver accepts that risk for the dev/dave merge.

items.title: Role changes remain staged until Save
steps: Choose a different role and select Cancel.
Confirm the original badge returns and no request is sent.
Choose a different role again and select Save.
items.expected: Cancel is local-only; Save calls the existing endpoint, refreshes the users query, and shows shared toast feedback.
items.notes: The focused selector tests cover local selection and Escape behavior, but no authenticated network inspection was run.
items.waiver: Explicitly waived by Dave on 2026-07-16 after contained acceptance was blocked by the missing repository-owned test:worktree adapter. The authenticated staged-save and request-boundary check was not run; this waiver accepts that risk for the dev/dave merge.

items.title: Invite Member reuses the role selector and permissions
items.precondition: Test once as an admin and once as a manager.
steps: Open Invite Member as an admin and inspect role options.
Open Invite Member as a manager and inspect role options.
items.expected: Admins see Viewer, Manager, and Admin; managers see Viewer and Manager only; the same animated selector is used.
items.notes: Role-option restrictions were reviewed in code but not exercised in an authenticated browser session.
items.waiver: Explicitly waived by Dave on 2026-07-16 after contained acceptance was blocked by the missing repository-owned test:worktree adapter. The admin-versus-manager invitation check was not run; this waiver accepts that risk for the dev/dave merge.

items.title: Narrow tables scroll without wrapping structural fields
items.precondition: Authenticated user on /settings/users with members and a pending invitation.
steps: Set the viewport below the 820px member-table minimum.
Inspect a long name and email.
items.expected: Tables scroll horizontally; headers, roles, dates, and actions remain single-line; long identities truncate with full values available by title.
items.notes: The no-wrap, truncation, and overflow classes were verified statically; the narrow authenticated app surface was not opened.
items.waiver: Explicitly waived by Dave on 2026-07-16 after contained acceptance was blocked by the missing repository-owned test:worktree adapter. The narrow responsive UI check was not run; this waiver accepts that risk for the dev/dave merge.

items.title: Alloro Docs default replica matches the polished tables
items.precondition: Build and serve the dedicated Alloro Docs worktree.
steps: Compare the default member and pending-invitation tables with the implementation.
items.expected: The replica uses the same table shell, fixed column proportions, truncation, badges, single-line actions, and pending-invitation hierarchy.
items.evidence: 2026-07-16: docs production build passed; browser DOM audit confirmed nowrap headers and Change Role, Remove, and Resend controls.
items.notes: The docs replica is isolated in /Users/rustinedave/Desktop/alloro-docs-worktrees/settings-team-table-polish.
